[DQC.US.0204.10706] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentGross with a value of 682,200,000 has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member us-gaap:ComputerSoftwareIntangibleAssetMember. The member us-gaap:ComputerSoftwareIntangibleAssetMember should not be used with the PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis as it is expected to represent an intangible asset. Please change the member to represent an tangible asset or change the axis to represent an intangible asset. i.e. FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis or IndefiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis.
